title: Newton's laws of motion
description: Three fundamental laws describing motion and forces in classical mechanics

title: Law of universal gravitation
description: Newton's law explaining gravitational attraction between masses

title: Thermodynamics
description: Branch of physics dealing with heat, work, and energy

title: Electromagnetism
description: Study of electric and magnetic fields

title: Quantum mechanics
description: Physics theory describing nature at atomic scales

title: Relativity
description: Einstein's theory explaining gravity and spacetime

title: Black hole
description: Region of spacetime where gravity is extremely strong

title: Dark matter
description: Invisible matter believed to make up most of the universe

title: Dark energy
description: Energy causing the expansion of the universe

title: Galaxy
description: Massive system of stars, gas and dark matter

title: Milky Way
description: Galaxy containing our solar system

title: Supernova
description: Powerful explosion of a star

title: Neutron star
description: Extremely dense stellar remnant

title: Event horizon
description: Boundary around a black hole where escape becomes impossible

title: DNA
description: Molecule carrying genetic instructions

title: RNA
description: Molecule involved in gene expression

title: Cell biology
description: Study of cell structure and function

title: Photosynthesis
description: Process plants use to convert light into energy

title: Evolution
description: Biological process of species changing over generations

title: Natural selection
description: Mechanism driving evolution

title: Atom
description: Basic unit of matter

title: Periodic table
description: Table organizing chemical elements

title: Hydrogen
description: Lightest chemical element

title: Carbon
description: Element fundamental to life

title: Oxygen
description: Element essential for respiration

title: Covalent bond
description: Chemical bond formed by shared electrons

title: Ionic bond
description: Chemical bond formed by electron transfer

title: Big Bang
description: Theory describing origin of the universe

title: Cosmic microwave background
description: Radiation left from the Big Bang

title: Gravitational waves
description: Ripples in spacetime caused by massive objects
